title: Mushroom Garlic Fluff Midnight Crunch
description: A low-carb Spanish dish featuring garlic-flavored mushroom and other light vegetables to satisfy a midnight craving.
instructions: Clean and slice the mushrooms. Dice the bell peppers and zucchini.
In a large bowl, mix all ingredients except for butter and olive oil.
Divide mixture into four portions and spread evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle 2 tbsp of avocado oil over each portion and sprinkle 1 tsp of butter. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Roast in the preheated oven for about 30 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from oven, let cool for a couple of minutes before serving.
